3308370.name: RPG Maker VX Ace - Fantasy Dreamland - Town Pack
3308370.description:
Embark on a magical journey through the realms of Fantasy Dreamland. This all-inclusive asset pack is a treasure trove for game developers, offering everything you need to create immersive and visually stunning games.


Tilesets: 16 sheets

City tileset:

- City tiles for your game!
- Multiple type of auto tiles
- Multiple type of buildings
- Customizable buildings
- Streets for cars
- 4 types of cars
- Playground
- Signs and traffic lights
- Windows and doors for buildings
- Lots of props!

Interior tileset:

- Interior tiles for your game!
- Multiple types of carpets
- Multiple types of grounds
- Plants, Lamps, TVs, Wardrobes
- Desks, Sofas, Beds
- Bathroom props
- Lots of props!


* UPDATE March 2025:

- fixed minor issues with A3 autotiles
- added additional outside tiles "FDR_Outside_A3" and "FDR_Outside_A4"
3308370.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 意大利语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 日语
